The fastest '''Sooman starship''' was given to [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] to take [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Plooz]] home to [[Alzar]].

==Appearances==
*[[Droids (1986) 4|''Droids'' (1986) 4]] {{1st}}
*[[Ewoks (1985) 10|''Ewoks'' (1985) 10]]
